calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-08-2009 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-08-2009 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production, Set One, And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-16-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Michael Raifsnider, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Denise D'Anne
Michael Balcksburg, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Scott Spiro

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted as modified. Defendant Denise D'anne's Motion to compel further responses to request for production, set one; and for monetary sanctions granted in part, denied in part, as follows:
a. Request for production no. 7, 10, 11 and 13 granted; plaintiff shall provide a supplemental response indicating whether they have, can identify or produce any documents in response to this request;
b. Request for production no. 25 granted; subject to the attorney-client and attorney work product privileges, plaintiff shall provide a supplemental response indicating whether they have, can identify or produce any documents in response to this request;
c. Request for sanctions Granted in the sum of $290.00 payable within 30 days. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-24-2009 Set For Trial On Oct-26-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Oct-08-09 At 03:00 P.M. In Dept 501
